calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-19-2007 Off Calendar

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-29-2007 Reset To Jun-19-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Petitioner: Lubia Perez, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem forthe Minor: Michael Jesus Montoya-Perez, was sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent or proof of service on notice, the OSC for Change of Name of the Minor is continued to June 19, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submit proof of service to the Minor's father of the new hearing date or file a Declaration with Application for an Order dispensing with notice.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-06-2007 Amended
